posts.text:
The DOJ's Epstein Files reveal new details about *Epstein's death* - and the DOJ's own misleading changes to an FBI account of a possible inmate near Epstein's cell the night he died.

Our report and timeline:
piped.video/QMaM5uw0jJ0?si=icY1…

Measuring Trump's first year and U.S. guardrails:

piped.video/aLDohZm4v6c?si=OWp-…
Threatening war because you didn't get a peace prize is a new one.

Legally, the DOJ is clearly violating the Epstein Transparency Act. 

Not a close call:
- Production did not meet the deadline. 
- There are about 4k new Fri files - a paltry portion of the total. (Takes less than a month to redact those)
- Most other docs were already public

had to ask ...  @50cent


vids that go hard (@vidsthatgohard)

50 Cent says his favorite villain is Diddy🤣

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/vidsthatgohard/status/1997121832705470518#m

in media news... appreciate the shout out 🫡

" @Mediaite names Ari Melber to its 2025 Most Influential List:

A rare cable news star who has a major social media presence ... 'The Beat' crushes CNN in its timeslot, but remains competitive with Fox News, cultivated a younger audience.

Melber’s clips rolling out his 50 Cent interview gained some *110 million* views across social media... 

'The Beat' has *1.8 #billion* total views on YouTube..."

mediaite.com/media/news/medi…

Special report on newly released emails:
piped.video/_HiOZ7JXA64?si=L27a…



Lawrence O'Donnell (@Lawrence)

Excellent presentation of Epstein-Bannon relationship by @AriMelber just now @MSNOWNews



— https://nitter.net/Lawrence/status/1991289041598210399#m
Special report on emails exposing Epstein-Bannon alliance: piped.video/_HiOZ7JXA64?si=L27a…

New: The Senate agrees to pass the House bill to release the Epstein Files. 

Congress has voted so overwhelmingly that this is now a veto-proof majority. The President has lost.
Facts never go out of style.

New Report
youtube.com/watch?v=QMaM...

MAGA-CNN THROWDOWN: Ari on the billionaire battle to control your news, films & future:

www.youtube.com/watch?v=CdFi...

BREAKING: Sen. John Cornyn and Ken Paxton received enough of the vote to advance to a May 26 runoff, according to The Associated Press.

A runoff occurs when no candidate wins more than 50% of the votes.

www.ms.now/liveblog/202...

youtu.be/tIBvihWOPNI
@arimelber.bsky.social  best political song of all time has to be “The Times They Are a Changing,” by Bob Dylan!
@arimelber.bsky.social Ohio- Neil Young
@arimelber.bsky.social Hi Ari. My jam is still “For What It’s Worth” by Buffalo Springfield.

“executive privilege.. would likely not apply to electoral conspiracies. Besides, Navarro had already happily discussed the Green Bay Sweep plot in a book and in interviews with MSNBC’s Ari Melber, among others. (Melber: “You do realize these investigators can hear you when you talk on TV?”)”

Thorough profile

www.newyorker.com/magazine/202...

On censorship, independent media & Ebro in the Morning

youtu.be/scozW9e7Ygk?...

So in just the past 3 weeks:

Trump DOJ lost James Comey case

and lost Letitia James case

Trump lost bid to stop the Epstein files vote 

Trump lost every GOP senator on that vote 

Trump also lost bid to stop release of 20,000 Epstein emails

MTG resigned 

GOP lost 2025 elections
Special report on emails exposing Epstein-Bannon alliance: youtu.be/_HiOZ7JXA64?...

Today, MSNBC becomes @ms.now: MS NOW – My Source for News, Opinion, and the World.

While our name has changed, who we are has not. You’ll find the same commitment to justice, progress, and the truth.

Same mission. New name.

Trump losing in court over extreme, 'illegal' ICE tactics

@arimelber.bsky.social reports on President Trump's legal setbacks and is joined by New York Times Magazine legal writer Emily Bazelon.
Mamdani on @thebeat.msnbc.com tonight

WATCH: Joe Rogan hits Trump on Iran war.
Listen to Ari Melber’s extended conversation with Tom Hanks on Apple Podcasts. Just search “The Beat” on Apple or wherever you get your podcasts! Or tap the link in bio. 🎧
WATCH: President Trump says Iran war is basically “complete,” as Pete Hegseth says it’s “just the beginning.”
Legendary Democratic Strategist James Carville on Iran war: “This was a domestic event. It wasn’t just a foreign policy event.”
